Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(******************************************************************************************

 The subobject classifier of partial setoids in a tripos

 We show that the category of partial setoids in a tripos has a subobject classifier. In
 essence, a tripos is a first-order hyperdoctrine in which we can take powersets. This also
 allows us to define a type, which we call a generic object and which we denote by [Ω], and
 the terms of this type represent propositions. We define the generic object by taking the
 powerset of the terminal object.

 To define the subobject classifier of partial setoids, we use this generic object. More
 specifically, we define a (partial) equivalence relation on it, which identifies two
 inhabitants of [Ω] if they are logically equivalent. Let us be precise. Every term [t] of
 type [Ω] gives rise to a formula [Prf t] that represents the provability of [t]. The
 partial equivalence relation on [Ω] identifies [t₁] and [t₂] if [Prf t₁] and [Prf t₂] are
 logically equivalent. Note that, in fact, this is an equivalence relation.

 We then proceed to show that this gives rise to a subobject classifier. For this, we must
 also define a morphism from the terminal object to the partial setoid defined in the previous
 paragraph, which involves defining a relation between the unit type and [Ω]. A term [t] of
 type [Ω] is related with a term of the unit type if and only if [Prf t]. Concretely, this
 represents the relation that relates the unique element of the unit type to every proposition
 that is provable.

 Verifying that this data actually gives rise to a subobject classifier is a matter of
 manual work. There are two interesting aspects in the proof. First, we constantly use
 monomorphisms. To use the monomorphism assumption, the lemma [partial_setoid_mono_eq] is
 useful. it allows us to identify two terms if they get mapped to the same term by the
 monomorphism. Second, we also need to use the assumption that some square is a pullback
 square. Here we use the lemma [subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_unique_lem]. This
 allows us to construct elements in the pullback.

 References
 - "Tripos Theory in Retrospect" by Andrew Pitts
 - "Realizability: an introduction to its categorical side" by Jaap van Oosten

 Content
 1. The partial setoid representing the subobject classifier
 2. Accessors for the partial equivalence relation
 3. The map representing truth
 4. The universal mapping property of the subobject classifier
 4.1. Maps to the subobject classifier
 4.2. The map gives rise to a pullback square
 4.3. Uniqueness
 5. The subobject classifier of partial setoids

 ******************************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monics.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.SubobjectClassifier.SubobjectClassifier.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.Tripos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.GenericPredicate.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERs.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERMorphisms.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERTerminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERMonomorphisms.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope hd.

Section TriposSubobjectClassifier.
  Context (H : tripos).

  (** * 1. The partial setoid representing the subobject classifier *)
  Definition omega_per_form
    : form ((Ω ×h Ω) : ty H)
    := let Γ := Ω ×h Ω : ty H in
       let φ := Prf [ π₁ (tm_var Γ) ] in
       let ψ := Prf [ π₂ (tm_var Γ) ] in
       φ ⇔ ψ.

  Arguments omega_per_form /.

  
H: tripos
per_axioms omega_per_form

  
H: tripos
per_axioms omega_per_form

    
H: tripos
per_symm_axiom omega_per_form
H: tripos
per_trans_axiom omega_per_form

    
H: tripos
per_symm_axiom omega_per_form
 
H: tripos
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((Prf [π₁ (tm_var (Ω ×h Ω))]
           ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Ω ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Ω) ×h Ω))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Ω) ×h Ω)) ⟩]
          ⇒ (Prf [π₁ (tm_var (Ω ×h Ω))]
             ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Ω ×h Ω))])
            [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Ω) ×h Ω)),
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Ω) ×h Ω))) ⟩]))

(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Ω) ×h Ω))]
⊢ (Prf [π₁ (tm_var (Ω ×h Ω))]
   ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Ω ×h Ω))])
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Ω) ×h Ω))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Ω) ×h Ω)) ⟩]
  ⇒ (Prf [π₁ (tm_var (Ω ×h Ω))]
     ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Ω ×h Ω))])
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Ω) ×h Ω)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Ω) ×h Ω))) ⟩]

per_trans_axiom omega_per_form

(φ ⇔ ψ) ∧ (ψ ⇔ χ) ⊢ φ ⇔ ?ψ

[π₂
   (π₁
      (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 : ty H) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))))]: form ((((𝟙 : ty H) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)

[π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 : ty H) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))]: form ((((𝟙 : ty H) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)

(φ ⇔ ψ) ∧ (ψ ⇔ χ) ⊢ ?ψ ⇔ χ

  (** * 2. Accessors for the partial equivalence relation *)
  
H: tripos
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
ω₁, ω₂: tm Γ omega_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ Prf [ω₁] ⇔ Prf [ω₂]
Δ ⊢ ω₁ ~ ω₂

  
H: tripos
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
ω₁, ω₂: tm Γ omega_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ Prf [ω₁] ⇔ Prf [ω₂]
Δ ⊢ ω₁ ~ ω₂

    
H: tripos
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
ω₁, ω₂: tm Γ omega_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ Prf [ω₁] ⇔ Prf [ω₂]
Δ
⊢ (Prf [π₁ (tm_var (Ω ×h Ω))]
   ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Ω ×h Ω))]) [⟨ ω₁, ω₂ ⟩]

    
H: tripos
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
ω₁, ω₂: tm Γ omega_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ Prf [ω₁] ⇔ Prf [ω₂]
Δ ⊢ Prf [ω₁] ⇔ Prf [ω₂]

    exact p.
  Qed.

  
H: tripos
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
ω₁, ω₂: tm Γ omega_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ω₁ ~ ω₂
Δ ⊢ Prf [ω₁] ⇔ Prf [ω₂]

  
H: tripos
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
ω₁, ω₂: tm Γ omega_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ω₁ ~ ω₂
Δ ⊢ Prf [ω₁] ⇔ Prf [ω₂]

    
H: tripos
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
ω₁, ω₂: tm Γ omega_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ω₁ ~ ω₂
ω₁ ~ ω₂ ⊢ Prf [ω₁] ⇔ Prf [ω₂]

    
H: tripos
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
ω₁, ω₂: tm Γ omega_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ω₁ ~ ω₂
(Prf [π₁ (tm_var (Ω ×h Ω))]
 ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Ω ×h Ω))]) [⟨ ω₁, ω₂ ⟩]
⊢ Prf [ω₁] ⇔ Prf [ω₂]

    
H: tripos
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
ω₁, ω₂: tm Γ omega_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ω₁ ~ ω₂
Prf [ω₁] ⇔ Prf [ω₂] ⊢ Prf [ω₁] ⇔ Prf [ω₂]

    apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  
H: tripos
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
ω₁, ω₂: tm Γ omega_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ω₁ ~ ω₂
q: Δ ⊢ Prf [ω₁]
Δ ⊢ Prf [ω₂]

  
H: tripos
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
ω₁, ω₂: tm Γ omega_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ω₁ ~ ω₂
q: Δ ⊢ Prf [ω₁]
Δ ⊢ Prf [ω₂]

    
H: tripos
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
ω₁, ω₂: tm Γ omega_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ω₁ ~ ω₂
q: Δ ⊢ Prf [ω₁]
Δ ⊢ Prf [ω₁]

    exact q.
  Qed.

  
H: tripos
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
ω₁, ω₂: tm Γ omega_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ω₁ ~ ω₂
q: Δ ⊢ Prf [ω₂]
Δ ⊢ Prf [ω₁]

  
H: tripos
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
ω₁, ω₂: tm Γ omega_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ω₁ ~ ω₂
q: Δ ⊢ Prf [ω₂]
Δ ⊢ Prf [ω₁]

    
H: tripos
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
ω₁, ω₂: tm Γ omega_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ω₁ ~ ω₂
q: Δ ⊢ Prf [ω₂]
Δ ⊢ Prf [ω₂]

    exact q.
  Qed.

  (** * 3. The map representing truth  *)
  Definition omega_partial_setoid_true_form
    : form (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙 ×h omega_partial_setoid)
    := Prf [ π₂ (tm_var _) ].

  Arguments omega_partial_setoid_true_form /.

⊤

          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h 𝟙) ×h Ω))),

            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h 𝟙) ×h Ω)))))

  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h 𝟙) ×h Ω))),

H: tripos
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (π₂
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((((𝟙 ×h 𝟙) ×h 𝟙) ×h Ω)
                                 ×h Ω))))) ~
                  π₂
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((𝟙 ×h 𝟙) ×h 𝟙) ×h Ω)
                              ×h Ω))))
                  ⇒ π₂
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            ((((𝟙 ×h 𝟙) ×h 𝟙) ×h Ω)
                             ×h Ω))) ~
                    π₂
                      (tm_var

H: tripos
t₁:= π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙)): tm ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙) 𝟙
t₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙)): tm ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙) 𝟙
tm (𝟙 ×h 𝟙) Ω
H: tripos
t₁:= π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙)): tm ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙) 𝟙
t₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙)): tm ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙) 𝟙
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h 𝟙)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h 𝟙))
⊢ ((Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
   [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h 𝟙)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h 𝟙) ×h Ω)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h 𝟙) ×h Ω)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h 𝟙), ?t ⟩]

      
H: tripos
t₁:= π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙)): tm ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙) 𝟙
t₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙)): tm ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙) 𝟙
tm (𝟙 ×h 𝟙) Ω

        exact (tripos_form_to_tm ⊤).
      
H: tripos
t₁:= π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙)): tm ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙) 𝟙
t₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙)): tm ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙) 𝟙
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h 𝟙)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h 𝟙))
⊢ ((Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
   [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h 𝟙)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h 𝟙) ×h Ω)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h 𝟙) ×h Ω)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h 𝟙), tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩]

      
H: tripos
t₁:= π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙)): tm ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙) 𝟙
t₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙)): tm ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙) 𝟙
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h 𝟙)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h 𝟙))
⊢ Prf [tripos_form_to_tm ⊤]

      
H: tripos
t₁:= π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙)): tm ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙) 𝟙
t₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙)): tm ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙) 𝟙
t₂ ~ t₂ ⊢ Prf [tripos_form_to_tm ⊤]

      
H: tripos
t₁:= π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙)): tm ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙) 𝟙
t₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙)): tm ((𝟙 : ty H) ×h 𝟙) 𝟙
t₂ ~ t₂ ⊢ ⊤

      apply truth_intro.
  Qed.

  
H: tripos
partial_setoid_morphism (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
  omega_partial_setoid

  
H: tripos
partial_setoid_morphism (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
  omega_partial_setoid

    
H: tripos
form (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙 ×h omega_partial_setoid)
H: tripos
partial_setoid_morphism_laws ?φ

    
H: tripos
form (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙 ×h omega_partial_setoid)
 exact omega_partial_setoid_true_form.
    
H: tripos
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  omega_partial_setoid_true_form
 exact omega_partial_setoid_true_laws.
  Defined.

  (** * 4. The universal mapping property of the subobject classifier *)
  Section UMP.
    Context {X Y : partial_setoid H}
            (m : Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y).

    Let φ : partial_setoid_morphism X Y := pr1 m.
    Let Hφ : isMonic (C := category_of_partial_setoids H) φ := pr2 m.

    (** * 4.1. Maps to the subobject classifier *)
    Definition subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_form
      : form (Y ×h omega_partial_setoid)
      := let x := π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) in
         let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) in
         let ω := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) in
         y ~ y
         ∧
         (∃h (φ [ ⟨ x , y [ π₁ (tm_var _) ]tm ⟩ ]) ⇔ Prf [ ω ]).

    Arguments subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_form /.

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_form

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_form

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
           ∧ (∃h (φ
                  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                   (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
              ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)))))

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))]
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
   ∧ (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
           (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
      ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩]
  ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)))

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
   ∧ (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
           (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
      ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)))

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
(π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
 ∧ (∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
         (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
    ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)))

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
(π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩]
∧ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
        [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩
        [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])
   ⇔ Prf
     [(π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩ ]tm])
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)))

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)))
∧ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩])
   ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))])
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)))

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) Y
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)))
∧ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩])
   ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))])
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)))

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) Ω
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)))
∧ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩])
   ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))])
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)))

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) Ω
y ~ y
∧ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩])
   ⇔ Prf [ω]) ⊢ y ~ y

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) Ω
y ~ y ⊢ y ~ y

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩]

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
(π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
 ∧ (∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
         (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
    ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩]

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
(π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩]
∧ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
        [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩
        [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])
   ⇔ Prf
     [(π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩ ]tm])
⊢ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω))) ~

  ∧ (∃h (φ

               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
           π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((... ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))))
           ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ Prf [ω₂]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                      ×h X))))) ⟩])

((y₁ ~ y₂ ∧ ω₁ ~ ω₂)
 ∧ y₁ ~ y₁

               (tm_var

           π₂

           ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁]))

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y

ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
((y₁ ~ y₂ ∧ ω₁ ~ ω₂)
 ∧ y₁ ~ y₁
   ∧ (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
           π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((... ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))))
           ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁]))
∧ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                      ×h X))))) ⟩]) ⊢ Prf [ω₁]

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
y₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
∃h (φ
    [⟨ π₂
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))))
     ⟩])
∧ (y₁ ~ y₂ ∧ ω₁ ~ ω₂)
  ∧ y₁ ~ y₁
    ∧ (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((...) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))))
            ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                         ×h X)))))) ⟩])

               
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
y₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
(∃h (φ
     [⟨ π₂
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
      π₂
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                     ×h X))))) ⟩])
 ∧ (y₁ ~ y₂ ∧ ω₁ ~ ω₂)
   ∧ y₁ ~ y₁
     ∧ (∃h (φ
            [⟨ π₂
                 (tm_var
                    (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                     ×h X)),
             π₂
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁ (tm_var ((... ×h Ω) ×h X))))))
             ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁]))
[π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))))
   ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                          ×h X)))))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))]

               
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
y₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
((∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((...) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))))
       ⟩]))
 [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))]
 ∧ ((y₁ ~ y₂ ∧ ω₁ ~ ω₂)
    ∧ y₁ ~ y₁
      ∧ (∃h (φ
             [⟨ π₂
                  (tm_var
                     (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                      ×h X)),
              π₂
                (π₁
                   (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((...) ×h X))))))
              ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁]))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))))
   ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                          ×h X)))))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))]

               
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
y₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y

(∃h (φ
     [⟨ π₂
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
      π₂
        (π₁
           (π₁

                 (tm_var

                     ×h X))))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))]
∧ ((y₁ ~ y₂ ∧ ω₁ ~ ω₂)
   ∧ y₁ ~ y₁

                 (tm_var

(((y₁ ~ y₂)

   [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))]

 ∧ y₁ ~ y₁
   ∧ (∃h (φ

                         ×h X))))))) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X), ?t ⟩]

                 exact x.

   ∧ (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂
               (tm_var
                  ((((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)
                   ×h X)),
           π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var ((... ×h X) ×h X)))))))
           ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₂
        (tm_var
           ((((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)),
    π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((((...) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)
                         ×h X))))))) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X), x ⟩]

((y₁ ~ y₂ ∧ ω₁ ~ ω₂)
 ∧ y₁ ~ y₁
   ∧ (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂
               (tm_var
                  ((((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)
                   ×h X)),

tm (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) X
 exact x.

  (π₁

x:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]

                   apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
               
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                  ×h X)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
y₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
ω₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) X
((y₁ ~ y₂ ∧ ω₁ ~ ω₂)
 ∧ y₁ ~ y₁
   ∧ (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂
               (tm_var
                  ((((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)
                   ×h X)),
           π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var ((... ×h X) ×h X)))))))
           ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ y₂ ~ y₁

  (π₁

 ∧ y₁ ~ y₁
   ∧ (∃h (φ

               (tm_var
                  ((((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)
                   ×h X)),

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
y₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
((y₁ ~ y₂ ∧ ω₁ ~ ω₂)
 ∧ y₁ ~ y₁
   ∧ (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
           π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((... ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))))
           ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ Prf [ω₂]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                      ×h X))))) ⟩])

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y

form ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)

((y₁ ~ y₂ ∧ ω₁ ~ ω₂)
 ∧ y₁ ~ y₁
   ∧ (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
           π₂

                            (((... ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))))
           ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ Prf [ω₂] ⊢ ?φ

m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

(((y₁ ~ y₂ ∧ ω₁ ~ ω₂)
  ∧ y₁ ~ y₁
    ∧ (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁

                    (π₁
                       (π₁ (tm_var ((... ×h Ω) ×h X))))))
            ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ Prf [ω₂]) ∧ ?φ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                      ×h X))))) ⟩])

form ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
 exact (∃h (φ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var _) , π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var _))))) ⟩])).

y₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
((y₁ ~ y₂ ∧ ω₁ ~ ω₂)
 ∧ y₁ ~ y₁
   ∧ (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
           π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((... ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))))
           ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ Prf [ω₂] ⊢ ?ψ

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
y₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
(((y₁ ~ y₂ ∧ ω₁ ~ ω₂)
  ∧ y₁ ~ y₁
    ∧ (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁ (tm_var ((... ×h Ω) ×h X))))))
            ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ Prf [ω₂])
∧ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                         ×h X)))))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                      ×h X))))) ⟩])

φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y

ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
∃h (φ
    [⟨ π₂
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                       ×h X)))))) ⟩])
∧ ((y₁ ~ y₂ ∧ ω₁ ~ ω₂)
   ∧ y₁ ~ y₁
     ∧ (∃h (φ
            [⟨ π₂
                 (tm_var
                    (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                     ×h X)),
             π₂
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var (((...) ×h Ω) ×h X))))))
             ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ Prf [ω₂]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                      ×h X))))) ⟩])

                      ×h X)),
              π₂

[π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
   π₂
     (π₁

              (π₁
                 (tm_var

                     ×h X)))))) ⟩]

       [⟨ π₂
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                       ×h X))))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))]

 [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))]
 ∧ (((y₁ ~ y₂ ∧ ω₁ ~ ω₂)
     ∧ y₁ ~ y₁

              [⟨ π₂
                   (tm_var
                      (((((...) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
               π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (...)))))) ⟩])

   [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
   π₂

                     ×h X)))))) ⟩]

            (tm_var

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y

  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
y₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
((((y₁ ~ y₂)
   [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))]
   ∧ (ω₁ ~ ω₂)
     [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))])
  ∧ (y₁ ~ y₁)
    [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))]
    ∧ (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((...) ×h X))))))
            ⟩
            [⟨ (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((...) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))
               [π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((... ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)
                      ×h X)) ]tm,
             π₂
               (tm_var
                  ((((((...) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)
                   ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])
       ⇔ Prf
         [ω₁
          [π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))
          ]tm]))
 ∧ Prf
   [ω₂
    [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))
    ]tm])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                     ×h X)))))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                      ×h X))))) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))
          [π₁
             (tm_var
                ((((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)
                 ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂
          (tm_var
             ((((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)
              ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])

               
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
((((π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((...) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))))) ~
    π₂
      (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))]
   ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))) ~
      π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))])
  ∧ (π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))))) ~
     π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))))))
    [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))]
    ∧ (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((...) ×h X))))))
            ⟩
            [⟨ (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((...) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))
               [π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((... ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)
                      ×h X)) ]tm,
             π₂
               (tm_var
                  ((((((...) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)
                   ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])
       ⇔ Prf
         [(π₂
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))))
          [π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))
          ]tm]))
 ∧ Prf
   [(π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))
    [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))
    ]tm])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                     ×h X)))))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                      ×h X))))) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))
          [π₁
             (tm_var
                ((((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)
                 ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂
          (tm_var
             ((((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)
              ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])

               
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
(((π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var ((((...) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))))) ~
   π₂
     (π₁

∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                     ×h X)))))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂
           (tm_var
              ((((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)
               ×h X)),
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
                          ×h X) ×h X)))))) ⟩])

      [⟨ π₂
           (tm_var

⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
               π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
               ∧ (∃h (φ
                      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                       (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                       [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                       ]tm ⟩])
                  ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))),
               π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))
               ⟩]
              ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
                 π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
                 ∧ (∃h (φ
                        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                         (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                         [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                         ]tm ⟩])
                    ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))),
                 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)) ⟩]
                ⇒ π₂
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))) ~
                  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))))

[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))]
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
   ∧ (∃h (φ

           (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
      ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))) ⟩]
  ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
     ∧ (∃h (φ
            [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
             (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
             [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])

    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)) ⟩]

      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))

   ⇔ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))])
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))))
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
          π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))))
          ⟩])
     ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))])
  ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))) ~
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω))

        π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁

                      ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))))
        ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])

  ∧ (∃h (φ

          π₂

                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))))
          ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₂]) ⇒ ω₁ ~ ω₂

H: tripos

m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

partial_setoid_mor_hom_exists_law
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_form
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
⊤
⊢ ∀h (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y))
      ⇒ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
             π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
             ∧ (∃h (φ
                    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                     (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                     [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm
                     ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
            [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩]))

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y))]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y))
  ⇒ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
         ∧ (∃h (φ
                [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                 (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
            ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
        [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩])

X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y))
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
       ∧ (∃h (φ
              [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
               (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
          ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
      [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩])

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y))
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
       ∧ (∃h (φ
              [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
               (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
          ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
      [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩])

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)): tm (𝟙 ×h Y) Y
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y))
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
       ∧ (∃h (φ
              [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
               (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
          ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
      [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩])

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)): tm (𝟙 ×h Y) Y
y ~ y
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
       ∧ (∃h (φ
              [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
               (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
          ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
      [⟨ y [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩])

X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)): tm (𝟙 ×h Y) Y
tm (𝟙 ×h Y) Ω
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)): tm (𝟙 ×h Y) Y
y ~ y
⊢ ((π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
    ∧ (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
            (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
       ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
   [⟨ y [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)): tm (𝟙 ×h Y) Y
tm (𝟙 ×h Y) Ω

          exact (tripos_form_to_tm (∃h (φ [ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var _) , π₂ (π₁ (tm_var _)) ⟩ ]))).
        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)): tm (𝟙 ×h Y) Y
y ~ y
⊢ ((π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
    ∧ (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
            (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
       ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
   [⟨ y [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y),
   tripos_form_to_tm
     (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])) ⟩]

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)): tm (𝟙 ×h Y) Y
y ~ y
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
  [⟨ y [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩
   [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y),
    tripos_form_to_tm
      (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])) ⟩
   ]tm]
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
          (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩
          [⟨ (⟨ y [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩
              [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y),
               tripos_form_to_tm
                 (∃h (φ
                      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)),
                       π₂
                         (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)))
                       ⟩])) ⟩ ]tm)
             [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])
     ⇔ Prf
       [(π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
        [⟨ y [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩
         [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y),
          tripos_form_to_tm
            (∃h (φ
                 [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)),
                  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
          ⟩ ]tm ]tm])

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)): tm (𝟙 ×h Y) Y
y ~ y
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
  [⟨ y [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩
   [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y),
    tripos_form_to_tm
      (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])) ⟩
   ]tm ]tm ~
  (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
  [⟨ y [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩
   [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y),
    tripos_form_to_tm
      (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])) ⟩
   ]tm ]tm
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
          (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩
          [⟨ (⟨ y [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩
              [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y),
               tripos_form_to_tm
                 (∃h (φ
                      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)),
                       π₂
                         (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)))
                       ⟩])) ⟩ ]tm)
             [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])
     ⇔ Prf
       [(π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
        [⟨ y [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩
         [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y),
          tripos_form_to_tm
            (∃h (φ
                 [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)),
                  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
          ⟩ ]tm ]tm])

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)): tm (𝟙 ×h Y) Y
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y))
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
  [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩
   [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y),
    tripos_form_to_tm
      (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])) ⟩
   ]tm ]tm ~
  (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
  [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩
   [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y),
    tripos_form_to_tm
      (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])) ⟩
   ]tm ]tm
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
          (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩
          [⟨ (⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)))
                [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩
              [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y),
               tripos_form_to_tm
                 (∃h (φ
                      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)),
                       π₂
                         (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)))
                       ⟩])) ⟩ ]tm)
             [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])
     ⇔ Prf
       [(π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
        [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Ω)) ⟩
         [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y),
          tripos_form_to_tm
            (∃h (φ
                 [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)),
                  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
          ⟩ ]tm ]tm])

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)): tm (𝟙 ×h Y) Y
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y))
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y))
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
     ⇔ Prf
       [tripos_form_to_tm
          (∃h (φ
               [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)),
                π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))])

⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y))
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
     ⇔ ∃h (φ

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)): tm (𝟙 ×h Y) Y
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y))
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y))
 apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)): tm (𝟙 ×h Y) Y
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y))
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
  ⇔ ∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
 apply iff_refl.
    Qed.

X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
form (Y ×h omega_partial_setoid)
 exact subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_form.
      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_form
 exact subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_laws.
    Defined.

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
∃h (φ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
       ∧ (∃h (φ
              [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
               (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
          ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
      ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
    ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
         ∧ (∃h (φ
                [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                 (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
            ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
∃h (φ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
       ∧ (∃h (φ
              [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
               (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
          ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
      ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
(∃h (φ
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
     ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
        ∧ (∃h (φ
               [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
           ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
     ∧ (∃h (φ
            [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
             (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
             [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
        ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
       ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))]

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
φ
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),

          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),

          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))]

          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩])

∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))

      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
   [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)))
      [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
   ∧ (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
           (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
      ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩]

    ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
   [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)))
      [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y), !! ⟩]

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
φ
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩]
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
          (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩
          [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])
     ⇔ Prf
       [(π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩ ]tm])
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩
   [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)))
      [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩
    [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y), !! ⟩ ]tm ]tm]
  ∧ Prf
    [(π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩
       [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y), !! ⟩ ]tm ]tm ]tm]

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
φ

∧ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
     ⇔ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)))])
⊢ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ~
  π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)))
  ∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)))]

  ∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)))]

φ
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
∧ y ~ y
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
     ⇔ Prf [ω]) ⊢ x ~ x ∧ Prf [ω]

     ⇔ Prf [ω]) ⊢ x ~ x

∧ y ~ y
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
     ⇔ Prf [ω]) ⊢ φ [⟨ x, ?y ⟩]

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
 exact y.
          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
∧ y ~ y
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
     ⇔ Prf [ω]) ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
 
H: tripos

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) X

y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
∧ y ~ y
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
     ⇔ Prf [ω]) ⊢ Prf [ω]
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
∧ y ~ y
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
     ⇔ Prf [ω])
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])

y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) X

   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),

  [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) X

∧ y ~ y
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
     ⇔ Prf [ω])

  [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y), x ⟩]
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
∧ y ~ y
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
     ⇔ Prf [ω])
⊢ φ [⟨ x, π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x, π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
    ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
         ∧ (∃h (φ
                [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                 (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
            ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
(∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
     ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
  ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
          ∧ (∃h (φ
                 [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                  (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
             ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))]

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
          ∧ (∃h (φ
                 [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                  (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
             ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))]

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ~
π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ~
        π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))
        ∧ (∃h (φ
               [⟨ π₂
                    (tm_var
                       ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)),
                π₂
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)))
                ⟩])
           ⇔ Prf
             [π₂
                (π₁
                   (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))))]))

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
(π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ~
 π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
 ∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))),
        π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ~
         π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))
         ∧ (∃h (φ
                [⟨ π₂
                     (tm_var
                        ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)),
                 π₂
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)))
                 ⟩])
            ⇔ Prf
              [π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))))])))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))]

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
(π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ~
 π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
 ∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))),
        π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ~
         π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))
         ∧ (∃h (φ
                [⟨ π₂
                     (tm_var
                        ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)),
                 π₂
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)))
                 ⟩])
            ⇔ Prf
              [π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))))]))
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
(π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ~
 π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
 ∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ((φ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ~
      π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))
      ∧ (∃h (φ
             [⟨ π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)),
              π₂
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)))
              ⟩])
         ⇔ Prf
           [π₂
              (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))))]))
   [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
(π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ~
 π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
 ∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ((φ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ~
      π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))
      ∧ (∃h (φ
             [⟨ π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)),
              π₂
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)))
              ⟩])
         ⇔ Prf
           [π₂
              (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))))]))
   [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y),
   π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩]

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
((π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ~
  π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))))
 [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))]
 ∧ Prf
   [(π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))))
    [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ]tm])
∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩
   [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
    [⟨ tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y),
     π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm]
  ∧ (π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ~
     π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))
    [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
     [⟨ tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y),
      π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
    ∧ (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂
                (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩
            [⟨ (⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))
                  [π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ]tm,
                π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                [⟨ tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y),
                 π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩
                ]tm)
               [π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X))
             ⟩ ]tm])
       ⇔ Prf
         [(π₂
             (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))))
          [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))
             [π₁
                (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h Y))
             ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
           [⟨ tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y),
            π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
          ]tm])

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
(π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))) ~
 π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))))
 ∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))))])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ~
    π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))
    ∧ (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂
                (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩])
       ⇔ Prf
         [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))))])

 π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))))
 ∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))))])
