H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Y
(π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))) ~
 π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))))
 ∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))))])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ~
    π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))
    ∧ (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂
                (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩])
       ⇔ Prf
         [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))))])

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Y
(x ~ x ∧ Prf [ω]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
  ∧ y ~ y
    ∧ (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂
                (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω])

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Y
(x ~ x ∧ Prf [ω]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Y
(x ~ x ∧ Prf [ω]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ y ~ y
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Y
(x ~ x ∧ Prf [ω]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)))
       ⟩]) ⇒ Prf [ω]
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Y
(x ~ x ∧ Prf [ω]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ Prf [ω]
  ⇒ ∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂
           (π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)))
         ⟩])

y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Y
(x ~ x ∧ Prf [ω]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Y
(x ~ x ∧ Prf [ω]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ y ~ y

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Y
(x ~ x ∧ Prf [ω]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Y
(x ~ x ∧ Prf [ω]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)))
       ⟩]) ⇒ Prf [ω]
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Y
((x ~ x ∧ Prf [ω]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩])
∧ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)))
       ⟩]) ⊢ Prf [ω]

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Y
x ~ x ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ Prf [ω]

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Y
Prf [ω] ⊢ Prf [ω]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Y
(x ~ x ∧ Prf [ω]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ Prf [ω]
  ⇒ ∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂
           (π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)))
         ⟩])
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Y
((x ~ x ∧ Prf [ω]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]) ∧ Prf [ω]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)))
       ⟩])

y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Y
tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) X
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Y
((x ~ x ∧ Prf [ω]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]) ∧ Prf [ω]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

 exact x.
          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Y
((x ~ x ∧ Prf [ω]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]) ∧ Prf [ω]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X)),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y), x ⟩]

X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Y
((x ~ x ∧ Prf [ω]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]) ∧ Prf [ω]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩]

m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Y
(x ~ x ∧ Prf [ω]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
x:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) X
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Ω
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩]

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    Qed.

    (** * 4.2. The map gives rise to a pullback square *)
    Section PullbackUMP.
      Context {W : partial_setoid H}
              (ψ₁ : partial_setoid_morphism W Y)
              (ψ₂ : partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙))
              (q : partial_setoid_comp_morphism
                     ψ₁
                     subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map
                   =
                   partial_setoid_comp_morphism
                     ψ₂
                     omega_partial_setoid_true).

      Definition is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_form
        : form (W ×h X)
        := let w := π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))) in
           let x := π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))) in
           let y := π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) in
           (∃h (φ [ ⟨ x , y ⟩ ] ∧ ψ₁ [ ⟨ w , y ⟩ ])).

      Arguments is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_form /.

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_form

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_form

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
partial_setoid_mor_dom_defined_law
  is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_form

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁

  omega_partial_setoid_true

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
partial_setoid_mor_dom_defined_law
  is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_form
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((∃h (φ
               [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
                π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
               ∧ ψ₁
                 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
                  π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)))))

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)))

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))]
∧ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)))

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
(∃h (φ
     [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
     ∧ ψ₁
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)))

     π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
⊢ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))

  π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))))
 [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))]
 ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
    π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))))),

      [π₁
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
      ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
   ]tm]
  ∧ ψ₁
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))))),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))
        ⟩
        [π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
        ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
      ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [⟨ (⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))),

           [π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
           ]tm)
          [π₁
             (tm_var
                ((((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂
          (tm_var
             ((((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
              ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ ψ₁
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [⟨ (⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))
             ⟩

             ]tm)
            [π₁
               (tm_var

                   ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂
            (tm_var
               ((((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])

X, Y: partial_setoid H

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
(π₂
   (π₁
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))))) ~
 π₂
   (π₁
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
 ∧ π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ~
   π₂
     (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))))
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁
    [⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)
                         ×h Y)))))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
     ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)
                      ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
       π₂
         (tm_var
            ((((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
       ⟩]
      ∧ ψ₁
        [⟨ π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            ((((((...) ×h W) ×h X)
                               ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))),
         π₂
           (tm_var
              ((((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
               ×h Y)) ⟩])

       ⟩]
      ∧ ψ₁
        [⟨ π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            ((((((...) ×h W) ×h X)
                               ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))),
         π₂
           (tm_var
              ((((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
               ×h Y)) ⟩])

     (π₁
        (π₁

                 (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) W

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(w₁ ~ w₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w₁, y ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)
                      ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
       π₂
         (tm_var
            ((((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
       ⟩]
      ∧ ψ₁
        [⟨ π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            ((((((...) ×h W) ×h X)
                               ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))),
         π₂
           (tm_var
              ((((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
               ×h Y)) ⟩])

              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) W

  (π₁

  (π₁

  (π₁

y:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y

 exact x₁.

           (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
ψ₁ [⟨ w₁, y ⟩] ⊢ ψ₁ [⟨ w₁, y ⟩]

              apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) W
w₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) W
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(w₁ ~ w₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w₁, y ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
 
H: tripos

m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) W

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var

  (π₁

  (π₁

y:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w₁, y ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

  omega_partial_setoid_true
w₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁

           (π₁

                 (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) W

(w₁ ~ w₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w₁, y ⟩]
⊢ ψ₁ [⟨ w₂, y ⟩]

     π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
      [⟨ ⟨ π₂
             (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))),
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
  ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
(∃h ((φ
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ₁
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
     [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ (φ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ₁
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ∧ ψ₁
          [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ π₂
              (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
     π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))]

   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),

 π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]

        [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),

        ∧ ψ₁
          [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),

  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),

          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
       ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
     ⟩ ]tm ]tm]
  ∧ ψ₁
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))),

         [π₁
            (tm_var

         ]tm,
       π₂
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
       ⟩ ]tm ]tm]
⊢ ((π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))
   [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))])
  [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]

((∃h (φ

           (tm_var

        ]tm ]tm]

        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),

             [π₁

             ]tm,
           π₂
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
           ⟩ ]tm ]tm]))
 [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]
 ∧ (φ
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))),

    ∧ ψ₁
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),

       [⟨ ⟨ π₂

   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),

X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =

  omega_partial_setoid_true
(φ
 [⟨ π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))),
  π₂
    (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
  ⟩]

X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) W
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
(φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩])
∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]: form (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)

Δ':= φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩]: form (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
(φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩])
∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) W
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

  (π₁

           (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y

Δ ⊢ Δ'

Δ':= φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩]: form (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂

                
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) W
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
Δ:= (φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩])
∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]: form (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
Δ':= φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩]: form (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

                apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
Δ:= (φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩])
∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]: form (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
Δ':= φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩]: form (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩] ⊢ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩]

                   
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) W
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
Δ:= (φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩])
∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]: form (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
Δ':= φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩]: form (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩] ⊢ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩]

                   apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, ?y ⟩]

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
partial_setoid_mor_hom_exists_law
  is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_form
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
⊤
⊢ ∀h (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W))
      ⇒ ∃h ((∃h (φ
                 [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
                  π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
                 ∧ ψ₁
                   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
                    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
            [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]))

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H

ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W))]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W))
  ⇒ ∃h ((∃h (φ
             [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
              π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
             ∧ ψ₁
               [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
                π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
        [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩])

           [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),

       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩])

w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h:= from_eq_partial_setoid_morphism_b q: (w ~ w
 ⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
      omega_partial_setoid_true)
   [⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩])
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
       subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map)
    [⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩]
w ~ w
⊢ ∃h ((∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
           ∧ ψ₁
             [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
              π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
      [⟨ w [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩])

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
(w ~ w) [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))]
∧ (ψ₁
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
      ∧ (∃h (φ
             [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
              (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
              [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
         ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
  [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((∃h (φ
            [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
            ∧ ψ₁
              [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
               π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
       [⟨ w [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))]

→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
w ~ w
⊢ (ψ₂
   [⟨ w [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
   ∧ Prf
     [(tripos_form_to_tm ⊤)
      [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h W), ?t ⟩]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
tm (𝟙 ×h W) 𝟙

              exact !!.
            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
w ~ w
⊢ (ψ₂
   [⟨ w [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
   ∧ Prf
     [(tripos_form_to_tm ⊤)
      [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h W), !! ⟩]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H

ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
w ~ w ⊢ ψ₂ [⟨ w, !! ⟩] ∧ Prf [tripos_form_to_tm ⊤]

 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂

X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
(w ~ w)
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h eq_partial_setoid 𝟙))]
∧ ψ₂
  [⟨ w [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h eq_partial_setoid 𝟙))
     ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)) ⟩]
⊢ (ψ₂ [⟨ w, !! ⟩])
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h eq_partial_setoid 𝟙))]

h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂

          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])

        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
ψ₂
[⟨ w [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h eq_partial_setoid 𝟙))
   ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h eq_partial_setoid 𝟙))
 ⟩]
⊢ (ψ₂ [⟨ w, !! ⟩])
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h eq_partial_setoid 𝟙))]

          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))

           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,

ψ₂
[⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
   [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)) ]tm,
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)) ⟩]
⊢ (ψ₂ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)), !! ⟩])
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h eq_partial_setoid 𝟙))]

  omega_partial_setoid_true

h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
ψ₂
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h eq_partial_setoid 𝟙))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)) ⟩]
⊢ ψ₂
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h eq_partial_setoid 𝟙))),
   !! ⟩]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
ψ₂
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h eq_partial_setoid 𝟙))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)) ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h eq_partial_setoid 𝟙))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)) ⟩
  ≡ ⟨ π₂
        (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h eq_partial_setoid 𝟙))),
    !! ⟩

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
ψ₂
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h eq_partial_setoid 𝟙))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)) ≡ !!

            apply hyperdoctrine_unit_tm_eq.
          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
(w ~ w) [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))]
∧ (ψ₁
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
      ∧ (∃h (φ
             [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
              (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
              [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
         ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
  [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((∃h (φ
            [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
            ∧ ψ₁
              [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
               π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
       [⟨ w [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))]
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
(π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))]
∧ (ψ₁
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
      ∧ (∃h (φ
             [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
              (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
              [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
         ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)), tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((∃h (φ
            [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
            ∧ ψ₁
              [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
               π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
       [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
(π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))]
∧ ψ₁
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)), tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)), tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
    ∧ (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
            (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩
            [⟨ (⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
                π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩
                [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)),
                   tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
               [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])
       ⇔ Prf
         [(π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)),
              tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
              [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm])
⊢ ∃h (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
           [⟨ (⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩
               [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)))
                  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))
                  ]tm,
                π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
               ]tm)
              [π₁
                 (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
              ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ⟩ ]tm]
          ∧ ψ₁
            [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
             [⟨ (⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩
                 [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)))
                    [π₁
                       (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))
                    ]tm,
                  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
                 ]tm)
                [π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
                ]tm,
              π₂
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
              ⟩ ]tm]))

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)))
∧ ψ₁
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ~
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))
    ∧ (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
       ⇔ Prf
         [(tripos_form_to_tm ⊤)
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm])
⊢ ∃h (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
          ∧ ψ₁
            [⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)
                              ×h Y))))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩]))

X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)))
∧ ψ₁
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ~
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))
    ∧ (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
       ⇔ (Prf [tripos_form_to_tm ⊤])
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))])
⊢ ∃h (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
          ∧ ψ₁
            [⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)
                              ×h Y))))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩]))

w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)))
∧ ψ₁
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ~
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))
    ∧ (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
       ⇔ ⊤ [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))])
⊢ ∃h (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
          ∧ ψ₁
            [⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)
                              ×h Y))))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩]))

h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),

        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])

           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w

         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))

        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)))
∧ ψ₁
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ~
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))
    ∧ (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
       ⇔ ⊤)
⊢ ∃h (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
          ∧ ψ₁
            [⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)
                              ×h Y))))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩]))

h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w

         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])

           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),

        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)))
∧ ψ₁
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ~
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))
    ∧ (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
       ⇔ ⊤) ⊢ ?Goal

X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
(π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)))
 ∧ ψ₁
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ~
     π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))
     ∧ (∃h (φ
            [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
        ⇔ ⊤)) ∧ ?Goal
⊢ ∃h (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
          ∧ ψ₁
            [⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)
                              ×h Y))))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩]))

X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)))
∧ ψ₁
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ~
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))
    ∧ (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
       ⇔ ⊤) ⊢ ?Goal

              
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
∃h (φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]) ⇔ ⊤
⊢ ?Goal

              
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
∃h (φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]) ⇔ ⊤
⊢ ⊤

              apply truth_intro.
            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
(π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)))
 ∧ ψ₁
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ~
     π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))
     ∧ (∃h (φ
            [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
        ⇔ ⊤))
∧ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
          ∧ ψ₁
            [⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)
                              ×h Y))))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩]))

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
