q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
(π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)))
 ∧ ψ₁
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ~
     π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))
     ∧ (∃h (φ
            [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
        ⇔ ⊤))
∧ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ?Goal0
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
((π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)))
  ∧ ψ₁
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ~
      π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))
      ∧ (∃h (φ
             [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
              π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))
              ⟩]) ⇔ ⊤))
 ∧ ∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h ?Goal))] ∧ ?Goal0
⊢ (∃h (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ⟩]
           ∧ ψ₁
             [⟨ π₂
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)
                               ×h Y))))),
              π₂
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
              ⟩])))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h ?Goal))]

  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =

  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
(π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)))
 ∧ ψ₁
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ~
     π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))
     ∧ (∃h (φ
            [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
        ⇔ ⊤))
∧ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ?Goal0

h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),

       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ

                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
∃h (φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ?Goal0

              apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
((π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)))
  ∧ ψ₁
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ~
      π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))
      ∧ (∃h (φ
             [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
              π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))
              ⟩]) ⇔ ⊤))
 ∧ ∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ⟩]
           ∧ ψ₁
             [⟨ π₂
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)
                               ×h Y))))),
              π₂
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
              ⟩])))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
(((π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]
  ∧ (ψ₁
     [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
    [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]
    ∧ (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ~
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)))
      [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]
      ∧ (∃h (φ
             [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
              π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))
              ⟩]) ⇔ ⊤)
        [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))])
 ∧ (∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ⟩]
           ∧ ψ₁
             [⟨ π₂
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)
                               ×h Y))))),
              π₂
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
              ⟩])))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =

  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
φ
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
∧ ((π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]
   ∧ (ψ₁
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]
     ∧ (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ~
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)))
       [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]
       ∧ (∃h (φ
              [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
               π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))
               ⟩]) ⇔ ⊤)
         [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))])
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
    [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]
⊢ (∃h (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ⟩]
           ∧ ψ₁
             [⟨ π₂
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)
                               ×h Y))))),
              π₂
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
              ⟩])))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]

h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
(φ
 [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
 ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]
   ∧ (ψ₁
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]
     ∧ (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ~
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)))
       [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]
       ∧ (∃h (φ
              [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),

               ⟩]) ⇔ ⊤)
         [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))])
∧ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]
⊢ (∃h (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ⟩]
           ∧ ψ₁
             [⟨ π₂
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)
                               ×h Y))))),
              π₂
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
              ⟩])))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]

h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]

          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))

           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
φ
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]
  ∧ (ψ₁
     [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))),

    [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]
    ∧ (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ~

              ⟩]) ⇔ ⊤)
        [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]
⊢ (∃h (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))

                               ×h Y))))),

              ⟩])))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
(((φ
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
   ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))) ~
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))])
  ∧ (ψ₁
     [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
    [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))])
 ∧ (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ~
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))])
∧ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
   ⇔ ⊤) [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]
⊢ (∃h (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ⟩]
           ∧ ψ₁
             [⟨ π₂
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)
                               ×h Y))))),
              π₂
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
              ⟩])))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])

       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩

        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
((φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))) ~
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))))
    [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))])
 ∧ (ψ₁
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))])
∧ (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ~
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]
⊢ (∃h (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ⟩]
           ∧ ψ₁
             [⟨ π₂
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)
                               ×h Y))))),
              π₂
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
              ⟩])))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]

X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
((φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))) ~
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))))
    [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))])
 ∧ ψ₁
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩
    [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm])
∧ (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ~
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))]
⊢ ∃h (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))
                [π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))
                ]tm,
              π₂
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))
              ⟩
              [π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)
                     ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ⟩ ]tm]
          ∧ ψ₁
            [⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)
                              ×h Y))))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩
             [⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))
                  [π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))
                  ]tm,
                π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
                [π₁
                   (tm_var
                      (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)
                       ×h Y)) ]tm,
              π₂
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
              ⟩ ]tm]))

  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
((φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))))
 ∧ ψ₁
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))
⊢ ∃h (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)
                      ×h Y))),
           π₂
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
           ⟩]
          ∧ ψ₁
            [⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)
                                   ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))))),
             π₂
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩]))

         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) X

           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
((φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))) ~

            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₂
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
        ⟩]
       ∧ ψ₁
         [⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((((...) ×h Y) ×h X)
                               ×h X) ×h Y)))))),
          π₂
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X), ?t ⟩]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) X

              exact (π₂ (tm_var _)).
            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
((φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))))
 ∧ ψ₁
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₂
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
        ⟩]
       ∧ ψ₁
         [⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((((...) ×h Y) ×h X)
                               ×h X) ×h Y)))))),
          π₂
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X),
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
((φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))))
 ∧ ψ₁
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₂
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
        ⟩]
       ∧ ψ₁
         [⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((((...) ×h Y) ×h X)
                               ×h X) ×h Y)))))),
          π₂
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
      [⟨ ⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X),
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])

X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
((φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))))
 ∧ ψ₁
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))
⊢ ((φ
    [⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
     ⟩]
    ∧ ψ₁
      [⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((... ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)
                           ×h Y)))))),
       π₂
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
       ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X),
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X), ?t ⟩]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) Y

              exact (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var _))).
            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
((φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))))
 ∧ ψ₁
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))
⊢ ((φ
    [⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
     ⟩]
    ∧ ψ₁
      [⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((... ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)
                           ×h Y)))))),
       π₂
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
       ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X),
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)): tm (𝟙 ×h W) W
h: (w ~ w
 ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₂
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
        ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]))
→ w ~ w
  ⊢ ∃h ((ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~
            π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
            ∧ (∃h (φ
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
                    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
                    ]tm ⟩])
               ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ w, tripos_form_to_tm ⊤ ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y)) ⟩])
((φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))))
 ∧ ψ₁
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
((φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))))
 ∧ ψ₁
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]

∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ~

⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))),

  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),

  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
w:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) W
((φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))))
 ∧ ψ₁
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
w:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) W
((φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ w ~ w) ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y ⟩]) ∧ y ~ y
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y ⟩]

partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
w:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) W
((φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ w ~ w) ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y ⟩]) ∧ y ~ y
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]

X, Y: partial_setoid H

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) Y

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
w:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) W
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]

              apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
            
H: tripos

m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
w:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) W
((φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ w ~ w) ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y ⟩]) ∧ y ~ y
⊢ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y ⟩]

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
w:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h Y) ×h X) W
ψ₁ [⟨ w, y ⟩] ⊢ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y ⟩]

              apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      Qed.

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
partial_setoid_morphism W X

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
partial_setoid_morphism W X

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
∃h ((∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ ψ₁
           [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
    ∧ φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]) ⊢ ψ₁

ψ₁
⊢ ∃h ((∃h (φ

            π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
           ∧ ψ₁
             [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
              π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
(∃h ((∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
          ∧ ψ₁
            [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
     ∧ φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]

m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) W
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ψ₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))]

 exact w.

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) W
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]

              apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁

⊢ y₂ ~ y₁

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
ψ₁
⊢ ∃h ((∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
           ∧ ψ₁
             [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
              π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁

partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
tm (W ×h Y) W
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁

ψ₁ ⊢ ?x ~ ?x
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map
  [⟨ ?x [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((∃h (φ
            [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
            ∧ ψ₁
              [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
               π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]

  omega_partial_setoid_true
tm (W ×h Y) W
 exact (π₁ (tm_var _)).

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
ψ₁ ⊢ ψ₁ [tm_var (W ×h Y)]

X, Y: partial_setoid H

φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
ψ₁ ⊢ ψ₁

              apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

  omega_partial_setoid_true
ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map
  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (W ×h Y)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((∃h (φ
            [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
            ∧ ψ₁
              [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
               π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]

w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) W
ψ₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))]

  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)
                      ×h Y))),
           π₂
             (tm_var
                (((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
           ⟩]
          ∧ ψ₁
            [⟨ π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁

                             (tm_var
                                (((((...) ×h X) ×h Y)
                                  ×h X) ×h Y)))))),
             π₂
               (tm_var
                  (((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩])
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))))
         ⟩])

  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (∃h (φ

               (π₁

                      ×h Y))),
           π₂
             (tm_var
                (((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
           ⟩]
          ∧ ψ₁
            [⟨ π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                (((((...) ×h X) ×h Y)
                                  ×h X) ×h Y)))))),
             π₂
               (tm_var
                  (((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩])
      ∧ φ

⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]

⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
ψ₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))]
∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂
         (tm_var (((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
       ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩

          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
       ]tm]
      ∧ ψ₁
        [⟨ π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((((...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)
                             ×h Y)))))),
         π₂
           (tm_var
              (((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
         ]tm])
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))))
     ⟩ [⟨ tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩ ]tm]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) W
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]

tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X

x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X

ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩]
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) W
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩] ⊢ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩]

                   apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) W
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
r: ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
ψ₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))]
∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂
         (tm_var (((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
       ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
       ]tm]
      ∧ ψ₁
        [⟨ π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((((...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)
                             ×h Y)))))),
         π₂
           (tm_var
              (((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
         ]tm])
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))))
     ⟩ [⟨ tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩ ]tm]

⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
ψ₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))]
∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂
         (tm_var (((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
       ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩

          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩

             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)
                              ×h X) ×h Y)))))),
         π₂
           (tm_var
              (((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
         ]tm])

X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H

ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) W
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
r: ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
ψ₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))]
∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁ (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))))
   ⟩ [⟨ tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩ ]tm]

X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true

⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y

⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
ψ₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))]
∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₂
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩

         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

              
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) W
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
r: ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y

                exact y₁.
              
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) W
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
r: ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
ψ₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))]
∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₂
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ ψ₁
     [⟨ π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((((...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)
                          ×h Y)))))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
      ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y), y₁ ⟩]

              
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) W
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
r: ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
ψ₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))]
∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
     y₁ ⟩]

              
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H

ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) W
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
r: ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
ψ₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))]
∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩]

ψ₁
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))),

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) W
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y

⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
 exact r.
              
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) W
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
r: ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩]
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) W
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
r: ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩] ⊢ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩]

                 apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) W
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
r: ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
ψ₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))]
∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁ (tm_var ((((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))))
   ⟩ [⟨ tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩ ]tm]

w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) W
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y

r: ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
ψ₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))]
∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ x, π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ⟩]

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) W
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
r: ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
ψ₁
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ⟩]
∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]

              
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) W
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
r: ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]

              exact r.
      Qed.

  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂

        apply (TerminalArrowEq (T := terminal_partial_setoid H)).
      Qed.

      Context {ζ : partial_setoid_morphism W X}
              (ζp : partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ = ψ₁)

                    =

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
ζ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ ?x [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]

        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))]

ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) W
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) X
ζ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true

  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂

y:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) Y
ζ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])

ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ζp: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ = ψ₁
ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) W
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) X
