∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ((φ
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ ψ₁
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)))
      [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) W

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ζp: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ = ψ₁
ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) W
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) Y
ζ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))), y ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))), y ⟩]

X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ζp: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ = ψ₁
ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) W
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) Y
ζ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y ⟩]

X, Y: partial_setoid H

  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) W

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ζp: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ = ψ₁
ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) W
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) Y
ζ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (ζ
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ w, y ⟩]

              
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ζp: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ = ψ₁
ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) W
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) Y
ζ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (ζ
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ w, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
          ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
       ]tm]
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ w, y ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])

              
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ζp: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ = ψ₁
ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) W
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) Y
tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) X
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ζp: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ = ψ₁
ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) W
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) Y
ζ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ (ζ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ w, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
       ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ φ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ w, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

X, Y: partial_setoid H

φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ζp: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ = ψ₁
ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) W
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) Y
tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) X

                exact x.

ζp: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ = ψ₁
ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) W
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) Y

⊢ (ζ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ w, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))

   ∧ φ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ w, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩]

⊢ ζ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]

              apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ζp: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ = ψ₁
ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
∃h (φ
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ ψ₁
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]) ⊢ ζ
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ζp: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ = ψ₁
ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
(∃h (φ
     [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
     ∧ ψ₁
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ζ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))]

w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) W

y:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) Y

⊢ ζ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩]

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ζp: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ = ψ₁
ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) W
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y ⟩])
∧ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ) [⟨ w, y ⟩]
⊢ ζ [⟨ w, x ⟩]

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

ζp: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ = ψ₁
ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) W
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y ⟩])
∧ (∃h (ζ
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ w, y ⟩] ⊢ ζ [⟨ w, x ⟩]

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =

  omega_partial_setoid_true
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ζp: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ = ψ₁
ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) W
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y ⟩])
∧ ∃h (ζ
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ w, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
          ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
       ]tm]
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ w, y ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])
⊢ ζ [⟨ w, x ⟩]

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ζp: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ = ψ₁
ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) W
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) Y
∃h (ζ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ w, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
        ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
    ∧ φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ w, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
          ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
       ]tm]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y ⟩]
⊢ ζ [⟨ w, x ⟩]

 ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y ⟩])
[π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ ζ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),

    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
∧ ζ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ζ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))),
   π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))) ⟩]

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ζp: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ = ψ₁
ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
(φ
 [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))),
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ₁
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
∧ ζ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ζ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))),
   π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))) ⟩]

(φ
 [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))),
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ₁
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
∧ ζ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ φ

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ζp: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ = ψ₁
ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) X
(φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y ⟩])
∧ ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩] ⊢ ζ [⟨ w, x₁ ⟩]

ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ζp: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ = ψ₁
ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) W

(φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y ⟩])
∧ ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩] ⊢ ?x₁ ~ w

x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) X
(φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y ⟩])
∧ ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩] ⊢ x₂ ~ x₁
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ζp: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ = ψ₁
ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) X
(φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [⟨ w, y ⟩])
∧ ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) Y

ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) W

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ζp: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ = ψ₁
ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) X
ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩] ⊢ ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W (eq_partial_setoid 𝟙)
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  omega_partial_setoid_true
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ζp: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ φ = ψ₁
ζq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X) = ψ₂
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) X
ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ⊢ ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩]

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      Qed.
    End PullbackUMP.

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
isPullback subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_comm

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
isPullback subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_comm

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: category_of_partial_setoids H
ψ₁: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, Y ⟧
ψ₂: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
eq_partial_setoid 𝟙 ⟧
q: ψ₁ · subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
ψ₂ · omega_partial_setoid_true
∃! hk : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧,
hk · φ = ψ₁
× hk · partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X = ψ₂

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: category_of_partial_setoids H
ψ₁: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, Y ⟧
ψ₂: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
eq_partial_setoid 𝟙 ⟧
q: ψ₁ · subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
ψ₂ · omega_partial_setoid_true
∑ hk : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧,
hk · φ = ψ₁
× hk · partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X = ψ₂
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: category_of_partial_setoids H
ψ₁: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, Y ⟧
ψ₂: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
eq_partial_setoid 𝟙 ⟧
q: ψ₁ · subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
ψ₂ · omega_partial_setoid_true
∏
t : ∑ hk : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧,
    hk · φ = ψ₁
    × hk · partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X = ψ₂,
t = ?x

ψ₂ · omega_partial_setoid_true
∑ hk : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧,
hk · φ = ψ₁
× hk · partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X = ψ₂

ψ₂ · omega_partial_setoid_true
category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: category_of_partial_setoids H
ψ₁: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, Y ⟧
ψ₂: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
eq_partial_setoid 𝟙 ⟧
q: ψ₁ · subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
ψ₂ · omega_partial_setoid_true
?pr1 · φ = ψ₁
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: category_of_partial_setoids H
ψ₁: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, Y ⟧
ψ₂: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
eq_partial_setoid 𝟙 ⟧
q: ψ₁ · subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
ψ₂ · omega_partial_setoid_true
(λ _ : ?pr1 · φ = ψ₁,
 ?pr1 · partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X = ψ₂)
  ?pr10

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

ψ₁: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, Y ⟧
ψ₂: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
eq_partial_setoid 𝟙 ⟧
q: ψ₁ · subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
ψ₂ · omega_partial_setoid_true
category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧
 exact (is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map ψ₁ ψ₂ q).
        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: category_of_partial_setoids H
ψ₁: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, Y ⟧
ψ₂: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
eq_partial_setoid 𝟙 ⟧
q: ψ₁ · subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
ψ₂ · omega_partial_setoid_true
is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map ψ₁
  ψ₂ q · φ = ψ₁
 exact (is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_pr1 ψ₁ ψ₂ q).
        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: category_of_partial_setoids H
ψ₁: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, Y ⟧
ψ₂: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
eq_partial_setoid 𝟙 ⟧
q: ψ₁ · subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
ψ₂ · omega_partial_setoid_true
(λ _ : is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map
         ψ₁ ψ₂ q · φ = ψ₁,
 is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map
   ψ₁ ψ₂ q · partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X =
 ψ₂)
  (is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_pr1
     ψ₁ ψ₂ q)
 exact (is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_pr2 ψ₁ ψ₂ q).
      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
W: category_of_partial_setoids H
ψ₁: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, Y ⟧
ψ₂: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
eq_partial_setoid 𝟙 ⟧
q: ψ₁ · subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map =
ψ₂ · omega_partial_setoid_true
∏
t : ∑ hk : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧,
    hk · φ = ψ₁
    × hk · partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X = ψ₂,
t =
is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map ψ₁
  ψ₂ q,,
is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_pr1
  ψ₁ ψ₂ q,,
is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_pr2
  ψ₁ ψ₂ q
 abstract
          (intros ζ ;
           use subtypePath ;
           [ intro ;
             apply isapropdirprod ;
             apply homset_property
           | ] ;
           induction ζ as [ ζ [ ζp ζq ]] ;
           exact (is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_unique _ _ _ ζp)).
    Defined.

    (** * 4.3. Uniqueness *)
    Context (χ : partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid)
            (p : partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ
                 =
                 partial_setoid_comp_morphism
                   (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
                   omega_partial_setoid_true)
            (Hχ : isPullback
                    (C := category_of_partial_setoids H)
                    p).

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
χ ∧ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])

    
H: tripos

φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
χ ∧ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])

y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
χ ∧ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =

  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
χ [⟨ y, ω ⟩] ⊢ y ~ y

        exact (partial_setoid_mor_dom_defined χ y ω (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).
      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
χ ∧ Prf [ω]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
χ ∧ Prf [ω]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  omega_partial_setoid_true
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
χ ∧ Prf [ω]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  omega_partial_setoid_true

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
∃h (((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
     ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
       y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ χ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ~
       π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
      ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
∃h ((π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ~
     π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
    ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h (((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
       ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
         y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ χ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
∃h (((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
     ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
       y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ χ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ~
       π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
      ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
(∃h (((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
      ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
        y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
     ∧ χ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
∧ ((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
   ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
     y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ χ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ~
        π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
        π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
       ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))]

     ∧ χ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
∧ (((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))])
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))),

       ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]))

 ∧ (π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~

⊢ (((π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ~
     π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
((χ
  [(π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)))
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ Prf
    [(π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
     [(π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)))
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm])
 ∧ (π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
    (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
    [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩])
∧ χ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ~
   π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩
   [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩
    [⟨ tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y), !! ⟩ ]tm ]tm]
  ∧ Prf
    [(π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h 𝟙))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩
       [⟨ tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y), !! ⟩ ]tm ]tm
     ]tm]

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
((χ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))]
  ∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))))])
 ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
   π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))))
∧ χ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ~
  π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))
  ∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))]

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p

ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
((χ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))) ⟩]
  ∧ Prf
    [π₂
       ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))) ⟩])
 ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
   π₁
     ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))) ⟩)
∧ χ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ~
  π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))
  ∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))]

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Ω
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
((χ [⟨ y₁, ω₁ ⟩] ∧ Prf [π₂ ⟨ y₁, ω₁ ⟩])
 ∧ y₂ ~ π₁ ⟨ y₁, ω₁ ⟩) ∧ χ [⟨ y₂, ω₂ ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))) ⟩ ~
  ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))) ⟩
  ∧ Prf [ω₂]

ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Ω
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
((χ [⟨ y₁, ω₁ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₁]) ∧ y₂ ~ y₁)
∧ χ [⟨ y₂, ω₂ ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))) ⟩ ~
  ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))) ⟩
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Ω

y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
((χ [⟨ y₁, ω₁ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₁]) ∧ y₂ ~ y₁)
∧ χ [⟨ y₂, ω₂ ⟩] ⊢ Prf [ω₂]

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Ω
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
((χ [⟨ y₁, ω₁ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₁]) ∧ Y [⟨ y₂, y₁ ⟩])
∧ χ [⟨ y₂, ω₂ ⟩]
⊢ (formula_to_partial_setoid H
     (χ ∧ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
  [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))) ⟩,
   ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))) ⟩ ⟩]

            
H: tripos

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Ω

y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
((χ [⟨ y₁, ω₁ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₁]) ∧ Y [⟨ y₂, y₁ ⟩])
∧ χ [⟨ y₂, ω₂ ⟩]
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y ×h Ω))
   ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y ×h Ω))
   ∧ (χ ∧ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))])
     [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y ×h Ω))])
  [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))) ⟩,
   ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))) ⟩ ⟩]

Hχ: isPullback p

((χ [⟨ y₁, ω₁ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₁]) ∧ Y [⟨ y₂, y₁ ⟩])
∧ χ [⟨ y₂, ω₂ ⟩]

    π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))) ⟩
  ∧ χ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))) ⟩]
    ∧ Prf
      [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))))]

  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Ω
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
((χ [⟨ y₁, ω₁ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₁]) ∧ y₂ ~ y₁)
∧ χ [⟨ y₂, ω₂ ⟩] ⊢ Prf [ω₂]

tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) omega_partial_setoid

ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Ω
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) omega_partial_setoid
 exact ω₂.
                 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Ω
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
((χ [⟨ y₁, ω₁ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₁]) ∧ y₂ ~ y₁)
∧ χ [⟨ y₂, ω₂ ⟩] ⊢ y₂ ~ y₁

y₂ ~ y₁ ⊢ y₂ ~ y₁

                     apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
                 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

  omega_partial_setoid_true

((χ [⟨ y₁, ω₁ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₁]) ∧ y₂ ~ y₁)
∧ χ [⟨ y₂, ω₂ ⟩] ⊢ ω₂ ~ ω₂

                     exact (partial_setoid_mor_cod_defined χ _ _ (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).

H: tripos

  omega_partial_setoid_true

  omega_partial_setoid_true

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Ω
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y) Y
Prf [ω₁] ⊢ Prf [ω₁]

              apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
∃h ((π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ~
     π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
    ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h (((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
       ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
         y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ χ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
(∃h ((π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ~
      π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
     ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ~
   π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
  ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
        ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
          y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ χ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))]

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
(∃h ((π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ~
      π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
     ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ~
   π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
  ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))])
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ∧ (π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
           y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
          [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩])
       ∧ χ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))]

          
H: tripos

m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
(π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ~
 π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
 π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))])
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ∧ (π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
           y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
          [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩])
       ∧ χ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))]

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
(π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ~
 π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
 π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (((((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))])
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ∧ (π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
           y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
          [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩])
       ∧ χ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩])

  [⟨ tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙), ?t ⟩]

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
(π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ~

[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
 π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]

  [⟨ tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙),

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
(π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ~
 π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
 π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
∧ Prf
  [(π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω)))
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ ((χ
    [(π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)))
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [⟨ tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙),
        π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩
       ]tm ]tm ]tm]
    ∧ Prf
      [(π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
       [(π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)))
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩
          [⟨ tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙),
           π₁
             (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))))
           ⟩ ]tm ]tm ]tm ]tm])
   ∧ (π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
      (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [⟨ tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙),
        π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩
       ]tm ]tm])
  ∧ χ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩
     [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
        [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) ×h Y)) ⟩
      [⟨ tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙),
       π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩
      ]tm ]tm]

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ~
π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))
∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))]
⊢ ((χ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))]
    ∧ Prf
      [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))))])
   ∧ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ~
     π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))))
  ∧ χ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩ ~
⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩
∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))]
⊢ ((χ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))]
    ∧ Prf
      [π₂
         ⟨ π₁
             (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))))
         ⟩])
   ∧ π₁
       ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
       π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩ ~
     π₁
       ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
       π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩)
  ∧ χ
    [⟨ π₁
         ⟨ π₁
             (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))))
         ⟩, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩ ~
⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩
∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))]
⊢ ((χ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩]
    ∧ Prf
      [π₂
         ⟨ π₁
             (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))))
         ⟩])
   ∧ π₁
       ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
       π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩ ~
     π₁
       ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
       π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩)
  ∧ χ
    [⟨ π₁
         ⟨ π₁
             (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))))
         ⟩, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩ ~

    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩]
    ∧ Prf

         ⟨ π₁
             (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))))
         ⟩])
   ∧ π₁
       ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
       π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩ ~
     π₁
       ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
       π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩)
  ∧ χ
    [⟨ π₁
         ⟨ π₁
             (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))))
         ⟩, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]

         ⟨ π₁
             (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))))
         ⟩])
   ∧ π₁
       ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
       π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩ ~
     π₁
       ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
       π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩)

         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))))
         ⟩, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]

ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Ω
⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),

⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩
∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))]

    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩]
    ∧ Prf

         ⟨ π₁
             (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))))
         ⟩])
   ∧ π₁
       ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
       π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩ ~

       ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),

         ⟩, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Ω
t:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) 𝟙
⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩ ~
⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩
∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))]
⊢ ((χ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩]
    ∧ Prf
      [π₂
         ⟨ π₁
             (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))))
         ⟩])
   ∧ π₁
       ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
       π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩ ~
     π₁
       ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
       π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩)
  ∧ χ
    [⟨ π₁
         ⟨ π₁
             (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))))
         ⟩, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Ω
t:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) 𝟙
⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩ ~ ⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩ ∧ Prf [ω₂]
⊢ ((χ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩]
    ∧ Prf [π₂ ⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩])
   ∧ π₁ ⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩ ~ π₁ ⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩)
  ∧ χ
    [⟨ π₁ ⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩,
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Ω
t:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) 𝟙
(formula_to_partial_setoid H
   (χ ∧ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
[⟨ ⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩, ⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₂]
⊢ ((χ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩]
    ∧ Prf [π₂ ⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩])
   ∧ Y [⟨ π₁ ⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩, π₁ ⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩ ⟩])
  ∧ χ
    [⟨ π₁ ⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩,
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Ω
t:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) 𝟙
(π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y ×h Ω))
 ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y ×h Ω))
 ∧ (χ ∧ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))])
   [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y ×h Ω))])
[⟨ ⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩, ⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₂]
⊢ ((χ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩]
    ∧ Prf [π₂ ⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩])
   ∧ Y [⟨ π₁ ⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩, π₁ ⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩ ⟩])
  ∧ χ
    [⟨ π₁ ⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩,
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Ω
t:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) 𝟙
(⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩ ≡ ⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩ ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₁])
∧ Prf [ω₂]
⊢ ((χ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩]
    ∧ Prf [ω₁]) ∧ Y [⟨ y, y ⟩])
  ∧ χ [⟨ y, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Ω
t:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) 𝟙
⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩ ≡ ⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩
∧ (χ [⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₁]) ∧ Prf [ω₂]
⊢ ((χ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩]
    ∧ Prf [ω₁]) ∧ Y [⟨ y, y ⟩])
  ∧ χ [⟨ y, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]

            exact (partial_setoid_mor_dom_defined χ _ _ (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).

ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Ω
t:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) 𝟙
(χ [⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₁]) ∧ Prf [ω₂] ⊢ ?x₁ ~ y
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Ω
t:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) 𝟙
(χ [⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₁]) ∧ Prf [ω₂]
⊢ ?y₁ ~ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))

⊢ χ [⟨ ?x₁, ?y₁ ⟩]

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p

ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Ω

tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙) Y
 exact y.

 exact ω₁.

(χ [⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₁]) ∧ Prf [ω₂]
⊢ ω₁ ~ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =

(χ [⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₁]) ∧ Prf [ω₂]
⊢ Prf [ω₁]
  ⇔ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)))]

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =

  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p

χ [⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩] ⊢ χ [⟨ y, ω₁ ⟩]

              apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
χ ∧ Prf [ω]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: category_of_partial_setoids H
⟦ formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]),
make_Pullback p Hχ ⟧
χ ∧ Prf [ω]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ χ
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ Prf [ω]

χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ tm_var (Y ×h Ω) ≡ tm_var (Y ×h Ω)
 use hyperdoctrine_refl.

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
(χ ∧ Prf [ω])
∧ ∃h (g
      [⟨ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)
          :
          tm (Y ×h omega_partial_setoid)
            (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
         [π₁
            (tm_var ((Y ×h omega_partial_setoid) ×h X))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h omega_partial_setoid) ×h X))
       ⟩])
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])

     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
(χ ∧ Prf [ω])
∧ ∃h (g
      [⟨ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h (φ

q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =

(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy

     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
∃h (g
    [⟨ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
       ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ⟩])
∧ χ ∧ Prf [ω]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
(∃h (g
     [⟨ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
        ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ⟩])
 ∧ χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))]
∧ g
  [⟨ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
     ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))]

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
