p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
((∃h (g
      [⟨ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ⟩]))
 [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))]
 ∧ (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))])
∧ g
  [⟨ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
     ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))]

[π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))]

    [⟨ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))

     ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ⟩]

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
(χ [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))]
 ∧ Prf [ω [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm])
∧ g
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
   π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)))) ⟩])

 ∧ Prf [ω [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm])

⊢ ∃h (φ

X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
y':= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
(χ
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))),
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
 ∧ Prf
   [ω
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩ ]tm])
∧ g
  [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩,
   π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)))) ⟩])

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X

ω':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
(χ
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))),
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
 ∧ Prf
   [(π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩ ]tm])
∧ g
  [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩,
   π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)))) ⟩])

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
y':= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
(χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩]
 ∧ Prf [(π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))) [⟨ y', ω' ⟩ ]tm])
∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)))) ⟩])

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
y':= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
(χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω']) ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)))) ⟩])

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
y':= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
h:= from_eq_partial_setoid_morphism_b
  (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback p Hχ)
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
     (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
        (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
     feq): ((χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
 ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
 ⊢ fy
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])
→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
  ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
  ⊢ (PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
       (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))
       fy
       (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
          (formula_to_partial_setoid H
             (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq
     · PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback p Hχ))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
(χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω']) ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)))) ⟩])

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
y':= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
h:= from_eq_partial_setoid_morphism_b
  (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback p Hχ)
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
     (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
        (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
     feq): ((χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
 ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
 ⊢ ((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
      y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])
→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
  ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
  ⊢ (∃h ((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
            (formula_to_partial_setoid H
               (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
            (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
               (formula_to_partial_setoid H
                  (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
(χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω']) ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)))) ⟩])

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
y':= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
h:= from_eq_partial_setoid_morphism_b
  (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback p Hχ)
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
     (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
        (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
     feq): ((χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
 ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
 ⊢ ((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
      y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])
→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
  ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
  ⊢ (∃h ((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
            (formula_to_partial_setoid H
               (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
            (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
               (formula_to_partial_setoid H
                  (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
(χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω']) ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
⊢ ((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
   ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
     y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
   π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]

   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),

→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
  ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]

            (formula_to_partial_setoid H

⊢ ((χ ∧ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))])
   [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
   ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
     (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
   π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
y':= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
h:= from_eq_partial_setoid_morphism_b
  (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback p Hχ)
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
     (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
        (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
     feq): ((χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
 ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
 ⊢ ((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
      y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])
→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
  ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
  ⊢ (∃h ((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
            (formula_to_partial_setoid H
               (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
            (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
               (formula_to_partial_setoid H
                  (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
(χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω']) ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
⊢ (χ
   [(π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ Prf
     [(π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
      [(π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)))
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩ ]tm ]tm])
  ∧ (π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
     (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
y':= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
h:= from_eq_partial_setoid_morphism_b
  (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback p Hχ)
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
     (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
        (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
     feq): ((χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
 ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
 ⊢ ((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
      y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])
→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
  ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
  ⊢ (∃h ((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
            (formula_to_partial_setoid H
               (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
            (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
               (formula_to_partial_setoid H
                  (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
(χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω']) ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
⊢ (χ [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))]
   ∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)))])
  ∧ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ~
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)))

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
y':= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
h:= from_eq_partial_setoid_morphism_b
  (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback p Hχ)
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
     (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
        (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
     feq): ((χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
 ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
 ⊢ ((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
      y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])
→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
  ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
  ⊢ (∃h ((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
            (formula_to_partial_setoid H
               (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
            (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
               (formula_to_partial_setoid H
                  (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
(χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω']) ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
⊢ (χ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
   ∧ Prf
     [π₂
        ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])
  ∧ π₁
      ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩ ~
    π₁
      ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
y':= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
h:= from_eq_partial_setoid_morphism_b
  (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback p Hχ)
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
     (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
        (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
     feq): ((χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
 ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
 ⊢ ((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
      y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])
→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
  ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
  ⊢ (∃h ((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
            (formula_to_partial_setoid H
               (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
            (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
               (formula_to_partial_setoid H
                  (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
(χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω']) ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
⊢ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [π₂ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩])
  ∧ π₁ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩ ~ π₁ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩

X, Y: partial_setoid H

x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
h:= from_eq_partial_setoid_morphism_b
  (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback p Hχ)
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy

    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
      y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])
→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
  ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
  ⊢ (∃h ((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
            (formula_to_partial_setoid H
               (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
            (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
               (formula_to_partial_setoid H
                  (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
(χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω']) ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
⊢ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω']) ∧ y' ~ y'

         [⟨ π₁

         ∧ φ

⊢ χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩]

X, Y: partial_setoid H

 ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]

    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
      y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),

→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
  ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
  ⊢ (∃h ((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
            (formula_to_partial_setoid H
               (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
            (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
               (formula_to_partial_setoid H
                  (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
(χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω']) ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
⊢ Prf [ω']

  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)

  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
y':= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
h:= from_eq_partial_setoid_morphism_b
  (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback p Hχ)
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
     (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
        (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
     feq): ((χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
 ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
 ⊢ ((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
      y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])
→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
  ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
  ⊢ (∃h ((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
            (formula_to_partial_setoid H
               (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
            (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
               (formula_to_partial_setoid H
                  (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
(χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω']) ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
⊢ y' ~ y'

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
y':= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
h:= from_eq_partial_setoid_morphism_b
  (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback p Hχ)
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
     (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
        (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
     feq): ((χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
 ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
 ⊢ ((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
      y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])
→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
  ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
  ⊢ (∃h ((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
            (formula_to_partial_setoid H
               (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
            (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
               (formula_to_partial_setoid H
                  (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
(χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω']) ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
⊢ χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩]

     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X

            ⟩]))

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])

            (formula_to_partial_setoid H
               (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
            (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
               (formula_to_partial_setoid H
                  (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),

⊢ Prf [ω']

→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
  ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
  ⊢ (∃h ((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
            (formula_to_partial_setoid H
               (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
            (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
               (formula_to_partial_setoid H
                  (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
(χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω']) ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
⊢ y' ~ y'
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
y':= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
h:= from_eq_partial_setoid_morphism_b
  (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback p Hχ)
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
     (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
        (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
     feq): ((χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
 ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
 ⊢ ((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
      y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])
→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
  ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
  ⊢ (∃h ((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
            (formula_to_partial_setoid H
               (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
            (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
               (formula_to_partial_setoid H
                  (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ⊢ y' ~ y'

          exact (partial_setoid_mor_dom_defined χ _ _ (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).

    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
      y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])
→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])

               (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
            (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal

                  (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
(∃h ((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
        (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy

 π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)))) ⟩])

    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~

            ⟩]))

        (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy

     π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩])

       π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)))) ⟩])

  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true

x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X

     feq): ((χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
 ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
 ⊢ ((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
      y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])
→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
  ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
  ⊢ (∃h ((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
            (formula_to_partial_setoid H
               (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
            (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
               (formula_to_partial_setoid H
                  (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
(∃h (((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
         (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))
         fy
         (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
            (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
         feq)
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
     [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X))]
∧ ((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
      (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
      (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
         (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
      feq)
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
   ∧ φ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
  [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)),
        π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X))]

  feq: partial_setoid_morphism

    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
      y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])
→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
  ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
  ⊢ (∃h ((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)

               (formula_to_partial_setoid H

         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
    (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
    (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
       (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
    feq)
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
  π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
[⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
   π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩
   [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
 π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)),
        π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X))]

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
y':= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
h:= from_eq_partial_setoid_morphism_b
  (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback p Hχ)
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
     (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
        (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
     feq): ((χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
 ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
 ⊢ ((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
      y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])
→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
  ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
  ⊢ (∃h ((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
            (formula_to_partial_setoid H
               (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
            (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
               (formula_to_partial_setoid H
                  (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
(PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
   (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
   (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
      (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)),
   π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)),
       π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))))
       ⟩])

tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X) X

m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
y':= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
h:= from_eq_partial_setoid_morphism_b
  (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback p Hχ)
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
     (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
        (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
     feq): ((χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
 ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
 ⊢ ((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
      y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])
→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
  ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
  ⊢ (∃h ((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
            (formula_to_partial_setoid H
               (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
            (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
               (formula_to_partial_setoid H
                  (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X) X

        exact (π₂ (tm_var _)).
      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
y':= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
h:= from_eq_partial_setoid_morphism_b
  (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback p Hχ)
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
     (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
        (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
     feq): ((χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
 ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
 ⊢ ((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
      y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])
→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
  ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
  ⊢ (∃h ((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
            (formula_to_partial_setoid H
               (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
            (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
               (formula_to_partial_setoid H
                  (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
(PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
   (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
   (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
      (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)),
   π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)))) ⟩]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)),
    π₁
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))))
    ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X),
   π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]

X, Y: partial_setoid H

  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p

     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X

  (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback p Hχ)
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy

     feq): ((χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
 ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
 ⊢ ((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
      y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])
→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
  ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
  ⊢ (∃h ((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
            (formula_to_partial_setoid H
               (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
            (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
               (formula_to_partial_setoid H
                  (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
(PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
   (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy

      (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)

 π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)),
   π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)))) ⟩]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)),
   π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)))) ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
q₁: χ ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ y ~ y
fy:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]) y q₁: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) Y
feq: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fy χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
(partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
(formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) omega_partial_setoid_true
g:= PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
  feq: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) X
y':= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
h:= from_eq_partial_setoid_morphism_b
  (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback p Hχ)
     (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
     (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
        (formula_to_partial_setoid H (χ ∧ Prf [ω])))
     feq): ((χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
 ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
 ⊢ ((χ ∧ Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y))]
    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ~
      y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])
→ (χ [⟨ y', ω' ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω'])
  ∧ g [⟨ ⟨ y', ω' ⟩, x' ⟩]
  ⊢ (∃h ((PullbackArrow (make_Pullback p Hχ)
            (formula_to_partial_setoid H
               (χ ∧ Prf [ω])) fy
            (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal
               (formula_to_partial_setoid H
                  (χ ∧ Prf [ω]))) feq)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Y) ×h X)))
            ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
φ
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)),
 π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)))) ⟩]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)),
   π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h X)))) ⟩]

      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    Qed.

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
χ = subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
χ = subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
χ
⊢ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
          (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
     ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))])
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
∧ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
        [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
   ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]) ⊢ χ

m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
χ ⊢ y ~ y

X, Y: partial_setoid H

φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
χ ⊢ χ [⟨ y, ω ⟩]

χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
χ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
  ⇔ Prf [ω]
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
χ
∧ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
⊢ Prf [ω]
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
χ ∧ Prf [ω]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])

χ
∧ ∃h (φ

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
∃h (φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩]) ∧ χ
⊢ Prf [ω]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
(∃h (φ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
      y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩]) ∧ χ)
[π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
   y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩]
⊢ (Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
((∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩]))
 [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))]
 ∧ χ [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
   y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩]
⊢ (Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
(∃h (φ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
      y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))]
∧ χ [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))]
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩]
⊢ (Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))]

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =

  omega_partial_setoid_true

χ [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))]
∧ φ

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
χ [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
   (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
   ]tm ⟩]
⊢ Prf
  [(π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))) [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))
   ]tm]

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
χ [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
   π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)))]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
χ [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ Prf [ω]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
χ
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ Prf [ω]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ y, ω ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ Prf [ω]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
r:= from_eq_partial_setoid_morphism_f p: (χ [⟨ y, ω ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
 ⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ) [⟨ x, ω ⟩])
→ χ [⟨ y, ω ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
  ⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism
       (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
       omega_partial_setoid_true) [⟨ x, ω ⟩]
χ [⟨ y, ω ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ Prf [ω]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
r:= from_eq_partial_setoid_morphism_f p: (χ [⟨ y, ω ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
 ⊢ (∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ∧ χ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
   [⟨ x, ω ⟩])
→ χ [⟨ y, ω ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
  ⊢ (∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~
          π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
         ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]))
    [⟨ x, ω ⟩]
χ [⟨ y, ω ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ Prf [ω]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
r: (χ [⟨ y, ω ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
 ⊢ ∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ∧ χ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ x, ω ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
→ χ [⟨ y, ω ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
  ⊢ ∃h (((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~
          π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
         ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ x, ω ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩])
χ [⟨ y, ω ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ Prf [ω]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ y, ω ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ χ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
      [⟨ ⟨ x, ω ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y))
         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
(χ [⟨ y, ω ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩])
[π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))]
∧ ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
   ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
  [⟨ ⟨ x, ω ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
⊢ (Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))]

⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),

       ∧ χ

      [⟨ ⟨ x, ω ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y))
         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ y, ω ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ ((φ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ χ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ x, ω ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X), ?t ⟩]

tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y

                 exact y.
               
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ y, ω ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ ((φ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ χ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ x, ω ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X), y ⟩]

               
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ y, ω ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω ⟩]

               
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω ⟩]

               apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) X
(χ [⟨ y, ω ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩])
[π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))]
∧ ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
   ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
  [⟨ ⟨ x, ω ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
⊢ (Prf [ω]) [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))]
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
(χ
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))),
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])
[π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))]
∧ ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
   ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
⊢ (Prf [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)))])
  [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))]

               
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
(χ
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))),
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩
  [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm]
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩
    [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm])
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ Prf
    [(π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm]
⊢ Prf
  [(π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm]

               
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
(χ
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))),
  π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩]
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))),
    π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩])
∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))
  ∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))))]
⊢ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))))]

               
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙) Y
(χ
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))),
  π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩]
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))),
    π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩])
∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))
  ∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))))]
⊢ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))))]

               
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙) Y
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙) Ω
(χ
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))),
  π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩]
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))),
    π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩])
∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))
  ∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))))]
⊢ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))))]

               
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙) Y
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙) Ω
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙) X
(χ
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))),
  π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩]
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))),
    π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩])
∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))
  ∧ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))))]
⊢ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))))]

X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙) Y
ω:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙) Ω
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙) X
(χ
 [⟨ y, π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))) ⟩]
 ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]) ∧ x ~ x ∧ Prf [ω] ⊢ Prf [ω]

  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
