ω:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙) Ω
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙) X
Prf [ω] ⊢ Prf [ω]

               apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Y
ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
χ ∧ Prf [ω]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       y [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])

ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
χ ∧ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])

ω:= π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)): tm (Y ×h Ω) Ω
χ ∧ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]

      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩])

            apply subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_unique_lem.
      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
∧ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
        [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
   ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]) ⊢ χ
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
(π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))
 ∧ (∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
         (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩])
    ⇔ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h omega_partial_setoid))]
∧ χ
  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h omega_partial_setoid))
     ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h omega_partial_setoid)) ⟩]
⊢ χ [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h omega_partial_setoid))]

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
((π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
 [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h omega_partial_setoid))]
 ∧ (∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
         (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((Y ×h Ω) ×h omega_partial_setoid)))
            [π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((Y ×h Ω) ×h omega_partial_setoid)
                   ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂
            (tm_var
               (((Y ×h Ω) ×h omega_partial_setoid)
                ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])
    ⇔ Prf
      [(π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h omega_partial_setoid))
       ]tm]))
∧ χ
  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h omega_partial_setoid))
     ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h omega_partial_setoid)) ⟩]
⊢ χ [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h omega_partial_setoid))]

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =

  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
(π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h omega_partial_setoid))) ~
 π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h omega_partial_setoid)))
 ∧ (∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var

                 ×h X)),
         π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁

                     ×h X)))) ⟩])
    ⇔ Prf
      [π₂
         (π₁
            (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h omega_partial_setoid)))]))
∧ χ
  [⟨ π₁
       (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h omega_partial_setoid))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h omega_partial_setoid)) ⟩]
⊢ χ [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h omega_partial_setoid))]

 ∧ (∃h (φ

         ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))]))

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

Hχ: isPullback p

ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω

 ∧ (∃h (φ

         π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
         ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]

H: tripos

m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true

ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y

y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
Δ:= ((y ~ y
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
          π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
          ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩])
∧ Prf [ω₁]: form ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
Δ':= y ~ y
∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
  ∧ ∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
         π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
         ⟩]): form ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
Δ ⊢ Δ'

              
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
Δ:= ((y ~ y
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
          π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
          ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩])
∧ Prf [ω₁]: form ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
Δ':= y ~ y
∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
  ∧ ∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
         π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
         ⟩]): form ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
((y ~ y
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
          π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
          ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ Prf [ω₁]
⊢ y ~ y
  ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
    ∧ ∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
           π₁
             (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
           ⟩])

                 apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

Δ:= ((y ~ y
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
          π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
          ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩])
∧ Prf [ω₁]: form ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
Δ':= y ~ y
∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
  ∧ ∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
         π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
         ⟩]): form ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
((y ~ y
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
          π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
          ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ Prf [ω₁]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩])
  ⇔ ?ψ
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
Δ:= ((y ~ y
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
          π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
          ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩])
∧ Prf [ω₁]: form ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
Δ':= y ~ y
∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
  ∧ ∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
         π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
         ⟩]): form ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
((y ~ y
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
          π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
          ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ Prf [ω₁]
⊢ ?ψ

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p

ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω

  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
          π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))

         π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
         ⟩]): form ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
form ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
 exact (Prf [ ω₁ ]).

                     apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

          π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))

Δ:= ((y ~ y
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
          π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
          ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩])
∧ Prf [ω₁]: form ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
Δ':= y ~ y
∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
  ∧ ∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
         π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
         ⟩]): form ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
r: Δ ⊢ Δ'
∃h (φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩])
∧ y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩] ⊢ Prf [ω₂]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
Δ:= ((y ~ y
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
          π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
          ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩])
∧ Prf [ω₁]: form ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
Δ':= y ~ y
∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
  ∧ ∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
         π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
         ⟩]): form ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
r: Δ ⊢ Δ'
(∃h (φ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
      π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩])
 ∧ y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩])
[π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
   π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩]
⊢ (Prf [ω₂]) [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))]

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
Δ:= ((y ~ y
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
          π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
          ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩])
∧ Prf [ω₁]: form ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
Δ':= y ~ y
∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
  ∧ ∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
         π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
         ⟩]): form ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)
r: Δ ⊢ Δ'
((∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩]))
 [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))]
 ∧ (y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩])
   [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
   π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩]
⊢ (Prf [ω₂]) [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))]

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
(π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))) ~
 π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))
 ∧ χ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)) ⟩])
[π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
   π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩]
⊢ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))])
  [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))]

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
((π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))) ~
  π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))))
 [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))]
 ∧ χ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)) ⟩
    [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
   π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩]
⊢ Prf
  [(π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)) ]tm]

X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) X
(y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ Prf [ω₂]

m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) X
r:= from_eq_partial_setoid_morphism_f p: ((y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
 ⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ) [⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩])
→ (y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
  ⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism
       (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
       omega_partial_setoid_true) [⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩]
(y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ Prf [ω₂]

r:= from_eq_partial_setoid_morphism_f p: ((y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
 ⊢ (∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ∧ χ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
   [⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩])
→ (y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]

         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
         ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩]))
    [⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩]
(y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ Prf [ω₂]

       [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩

          ]tm,

           ]tm,

         ⟩])

        [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩

           ]tm,

         ⟩])
((y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩])
[π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))]
∧ ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
   ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
  [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
⊢ (Prf [ω₂])
  [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))]

⊢ ((φ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ χ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X), ?t ⟩]

               
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) X
r: ((y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
 ⊢ ∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ∧ χ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
          [π₁
             (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y))
        ⟩]))
→ (y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
  ⊢ ∃h (((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~
          π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
         ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
           [π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))
           ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))
         ⟩])
tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Y

                 exact y.

m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p

ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω

r: ((y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
 ⊢ ∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ∧ χ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
          [π₁
             (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y))
        ⟩]))
→ (y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
  ⊢ ∃h (((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~

         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
         ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
           [π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))
           ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))
         ⟩])
(y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ ((φ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ χ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X), y ⟩]

  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)

        ∧ χ

       [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩

          ]tm,

         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),

           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
           [π₁
              (tm_var

           ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))
         ⟩])
(y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]

               
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) X
r: ((y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
 ⊢ ∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ∧ χ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
          [π₁
             (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y))
        ⟩]))
→ (y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
  ⊢ ∃h (((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~
          π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
         ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
           [π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))
           ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))
         ⟩])
y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]

               
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =

  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) X
r: ((y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
 ⊢ ∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ∧ χ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
          [π₁
             (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y))
        ⟩]))
→ (y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
  ⊢ ∃h (((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~
          π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
         ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
           [π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))
           ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))
         ⟩])
χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]

               
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) X
r: ((y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
 ⊢ ∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ∧ χ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
          [π₁
             (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y))
        ⟩]))
→ (y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
  ⊢ ∃h (((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~
          π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
         ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
           [π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))
           ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))
         ⟩])
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]

               apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) X
r: ((y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
 ⊢ ∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ∧ χ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
          [π₁
             (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y))
        ⟩]))
→ (y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
  ⊢ ∃h (((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~
          π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
         ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
           [π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))
           ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))
         ⟩])
((y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩])
[π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))]
∧ ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
   ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
  [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
⊢ (Prf [ω₂])
  [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))]
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) X
r: ((y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
 ⊢ ∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ∧ χ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
          [π₁
             (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y))
        ⟩]))
→ (y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
  ⊢ ∃h (((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~
          π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
         ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
           [π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))
           ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))
         ⟩])
(((y ~ y) [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))]
  ∧ χ
    [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm])
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ x, y ⟩
    [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm])
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ Prf
    [(π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩ ]tm
     ]tm]
⊢ Prf
  [ω₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm]

               
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) X
r: ((y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
 ⊢ ∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ∧ χ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
          [π₁
             (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y))
        ⟩]))
→ (y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
  ⊢ ∃h (((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~
          π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
         ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
           [π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))
           ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))
         ⟩])
((y [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm ~
  y [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm
  ∧ χ
    [⟨ y [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))
       ]tm,
     ω₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm
     ⟩])
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm,
    y [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm ⟩])
∧ x [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm ~
  x [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm
  ∧ Prf
    [ω₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm]
⊢ Prf
  [ω₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm]

               
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) Ω
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)): tm (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) X
r: ((y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
 ⊢ ∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ∧ χ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h Y))) ⟩])
       [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
          [π₁
             (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h Y))
        ⟩]))
→ (y ~ y ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
  ⊢ ∃h (((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)) ~
          π₁ (tm_var (X ×h 𝟙)))
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)) ⟩]
         ∧ (Prf [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Ω))])
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Ω) ×h 𝟙))) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ x, ω₂ ⟩
           [π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))
           ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙))
         ⟩])
Prf
[ω₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm]
⊢ Prf
  [ω₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X) ×h 𝟙)) ]tm]

               apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
((y ~ y
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
          π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
          ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ Prf [ω₂]
⊢ Prf [ω₁]

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
((y ~ y
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
          π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
          ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ Prf [ω₂]
⊢ ?Goal ⇔ Prf [ω₁]

       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩])
   ⇔ Prf [ω₁]) ⊢ ?Goal ⇔ Prf [ω₁]

    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩])

              apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
((y ~ y
  ∧ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
          π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
          ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]) ∧ Prf [ω₂]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩])

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
y ~ y
∧ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩])
   ⇔ Prf [ω₁]) ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₂]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩])

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =

  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₂]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩])

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
q:= hyperdoctrine_proof_subst ⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_unique_lem: (χ ∧ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]) [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₂]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩])

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
q:= hyperdoctrine_proof_subst ⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_unique_lem: (χ ∧ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]) [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₂]
⊢ (χ ∧ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]) [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
q:= hyperdoctrine_proof_subst ⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_unique_lem: (χ ∧ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]) [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
(∃h (φ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
      π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]))
[⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩])

            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
q:= hyperdoctrine_proof_subst ⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_unique_lem: (χ ∧ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]) [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₂]
⊢ (χ ∧ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]) [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
q:= hyperdoctrine_proof_subst ⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_unique_lem: (χ ∧ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]) [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₂] ⊢ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩] ∧ Prf [ω₂]

               apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
            
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
q:= hyperdoctrine_proof_subst ⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_unique_lem: (χ ∧ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]) [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
(∃h (φ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
      π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]))
[⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩])
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
q:= hyperdoctrine_proof_subst ⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_unique_lem: (χ ∧ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]) [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
(∃h (φ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
      π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]))
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))), ω₂ ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩])

               
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
q:= hyperdoctrine_proof_subst ⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩
  subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_unique_lem: (χ ∧ Prf [π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Ω))]) [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X)),
        π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
∃h (φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
     π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
       π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)))) ⟩])

               apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
(y ~ y
 ∧ (∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X)),
         π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) ×h X))))
         ⟩]) ⇔ Prf [ω₁])) ∧ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
⊢ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
φ:= pr1 m: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ:= pr2 m: isMonic φ
χ: partial_setoid_morphism Y omega_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ χ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoid_morphism_to_terminal X)
  omega_partial_setoid_true
Hχ: isPullback p
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Y
ω₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω))): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
ω₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω)): tm ((Y ×h Ω) ×h Ω) Ω
χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩] ⊢ χ [⟨ y, ω₂ ⟩]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    Qed.
  End UMP.

  (** * 5. The subobject classifier of partial setoids *)
  
H: tripos
subobject_classifier (terminal_partial_setoid H)

  
H: tripos
subobject_classifier (terminal_partial_setoid H)

    
H: tripos
category_of_partial_setoids H
H: tripos
category_of_partial_setoids H
⟦ terminal_partial_setoid H, ?Ω ⟧
H: tripos
is_subobject_classifier (terminal_partial_setoid H) 
  ?Ω ?t

    
H: tripos
category_of_partial_setoids H
 exact omega_partial_setoid.
    
H: tripos
category_of_partial_setoids H
⟦ terminal_partial_setoid H, omega_partial_setoid ⟧
 exact omega_partial_setoid_true.
    
H: tripos
is_subobject_classifier (terminal_partial_setoid H)
  omega_partial_setoid omega_partial_setoid_true
 
H: tripos
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
∃! (χ : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ Y,
        omega_partial_setoid ⟧)
(H0 : m · χ =
      TerminalArrow (terminal_partial_setoid H) X
      · omega_partial_setoid_true), isPullback H0

      
H: tripos
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
∑
(χ : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ Y,
     omega_partial_setoid ⟧)
(H0 : m · χ =
      TerminalArrow (terminal_partial_setoid H) X
      · omega_partial_setoid_true), isPullback H0
H: tripos
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
∏
t : ∑
    (χ : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ Y,
         omega_partial_setoid ⟧)
    (H0 : m · χ =
          TerminalArrow (terminal_partial_setoid H) X
          · omega_partial_setoid_true), isPullback H0,
t = ?x

      
H: tripos
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
∑
(χ : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ Y,
     omega_partial_setoid ⟧)
(H0 : m · χ =
      TerminalArrow (terminal_partial_setoid H) X
      · omega_partial_setoid_true), isPullback H0
 
H: tripos
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ Y,
omega_partial_setoid ⟧
H: tripos
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
m · ?pr1 =
TerminalArrow (terminal_partial_setoid H) X
· omega_partial_setoid_true
H: tripos
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
(λ H0 : m · ?pr1 =
        TerminalArrow (terminal_partial_setoid H) X
        · omega_partial_setoid_true, isPullback H0)
  ?pr10

        
H: tripos
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ Y,
omega_partial_setoid ⟧
 exact (subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map m).
        
H: tripos
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
m · subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map m =
TerminalArrow (terminal_partial_setoid H) X
· omega_partial_setoid_true
 exact (subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_comm m).
        
H: tripos
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
(λ H0 : m · subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map m =
        TerminalArrow (terminal_partial_setoid H) X
        · omega_partial_setoid_true, isPullback H0)
  (subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_comm m)
 exact (is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid m).
      
H: tripos
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
m: Monic (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
∏
t : ∑
    (χ : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ Y,
         omega_partial_setoid ⟧)
    (H0 : m · χ =
          TerminalArrow (terminal_partial_setoid H) X
          · omega_partial_setoid_true), isPullback H0,
t =
subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map m,,
subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_comm m,,
is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid m
 abstract
          (intros χ ;
           use subtypePath ;
           [ intro ;
             use isaproptotal2 ;
             [ intro ; apply isaprop_isPullback
             | intros ; apply homset_property ]
           | ] ;
           induction χ as [ χ [ p Hχ ] ] ;
           cbn ;
           exact (subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_unique m χ p Hχ)).
  Defined.
End TriposSubobjectClassifier.

Arguments omega_per_form H /.
Arguments omega_partial_setoid_true_form H /.
Arguments subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_form {H X Y} m /.
Arguments is_pullback_subobject_classifier_partial_setoid_map_form {H X Y} m {W} ψ₁ /.
